<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Close AI session"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/ai/sessions/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Soft-closes an AI session.
